title: Everyday Eclectic Blog Hop
excerpt: We're excited to have a blog hop to show you some ideas using Allison Kreft's new Everyday Eclectic line from Echo Park Papers . It's no secret that I have loved Allison's work since I first started scrapbooking. Her eclectic…
body:
We're excited to have a blog hop to show you some ideas using Allison Kreft's new Everyday Eclectic line from Echo Park Papers.

It's no secret that I have loved Allison's work since I first started scrapbooking. Her eclectic designs for Hambly have been a favorite since the day I laid eyes on the hot pink dingbat rub-ons. So thrilled for her and this amazing collection with Echo Park. 

If I had to pick a favorite thing from the collection, I couldn't. The patterned papers are just delightful, and so are the sticker sheets. For this layout I used a square punch and then cut the pieces in half. After I adhered the pieces down, I poked the holes for the hand-stitching. I used a back-stitch across the triangles and a straight stitch around the rest. Blog Hop List: Echo Park Blog Allison Kreft Ali Edwards Amy Tan (you are here) Dina Wakley Kayla Aimee Kelly Purkey  Kerry Lynn Yeary

Giveaway: ONE winner will be selected from each blog to receive an Echo Park Paper Everyday Eclectic collection kit. To qualify for the giveaway, post a comment by midnight EST, Sunday, September 2nd. Be sure to leave a comment on each blog and check back there to see if you've won. Each blog will announce its own winner. Please leave comments for this blog's giveaway in the comments section below! (open to U.S. AND international residents)

Next stop: Dina Wakley WINNER: #46 Christi parker says: August 31, 2012 at 6:39 am (Edit)

Awesome photo and beautiful layout!
